message:
Add mux client batch render tests, expand pool coverage, and fix WebGPU texture format selection

mux_client.rs (+218 lines): added cx-aware batch render changes test
(batch_render_changes_with_cx_zero_pipeline_depth_is_clamped_and_succeeds)
verifying that zero pipeline depth is clamped to a minimum and batch
render operations complete successfully with proper mock server
handshake, SetClientId, and per-pane GetPaneRenderChanges responses.

mux_pool.rs (+47 lines): additional pool test coverage for edge cases
in connection lifecycle and recovery behavior.

webgpu.rs: fixed typo "exceeed" -> "exceed" in texture dimension error
message. Extracted select_view_formats_for_format() helper that properly
generates both sRGB and linear format variants when they differ (or a
single-element vec when they're the same format), replacing the previous
inline logic that could produce duplicate entries when format already
lacked an sRGB suffix. Both WebGpuTexture::new() and
select_surface_view_formats() now use the shared helper. Test imports
updated to include the new function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
